(Indication): Antibiotic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antibiotic medication and whether there is an indication noted for all medications in the drug class. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
942 DRTC_TKNG_CD DRTC_TKNG_CD N0415G1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Diuretic CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking diuretic medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective
